privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook sample database, mounted at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. The agent is required to create a DBeaver connection named 'Chinook', analyze three slow queries (tracks filtered on Milliseconds+UnitPrice, invoices filtered on InvoiceDate, tracks filtered on Composer NOT NULL), and create at least three descriptive indexes like 'idx_tracks_milliseconds', 'idx_invoices_date', and 'idx_tracks_composer'. The agent must write an optimization report to /home/ga/Documents/reports/index_report.txt. All setup paths and expected outputs are verified against task.json and the evaluation scripts.
